headline: Dollar General's Q4 Earnings Beat Mark, Same-Store Sales Rise 4.3%
summary: DG beats Q4 estimates with 5.9% sales growth and surging profits, fueled by higher traffic, same-store sales gains and margin expansion.

headline: SFIX Posts Narrower Q2 Loss, Lifts FY26 View on Improving Momentum
summary: Stitch Fix Q2 loss narrows y/y and tops estimates. It raises FY26 outlook as higher AOV and AI-driven personalization help lift revenues and client spending.

raw.headline: SFIX Posts Narrower Q2 Loss, Lifts FY26 View on Improving Momentum

headline: Elsa Hosk & Rina Sawayama Celebrate Signature Feel of UGG With New Spring Styles
summary: SANTA BARBARA, Calif., March 12, 2026--Southern California-based global lifestyle brand UGG® (a division of Deckers Brands [NYSE: DECK] reimagines its iconic classics into new, dynamic, warm-weather styles. Introducing the Spring 2026 Golden Collection, a line of sandals and clogs that deliver the UGG signature comfort and style for sunny days. The same cozy feeling, the same UGG®, all year long.

raw.headline: Elsa Hosk & Rina Sawayama Celebrate Signature Feel of UGG With New Spring Styles
raw.summary: SANTA BARBARA, Calif., March 12, 2026--Southern California-based global lifestyle brand UGG® (a division of Deckers Brands [NYSE: DECK] reimagines its iconic classics into new, dynamic, warm-weather styles. headline: UGG Leans Into Fashion & Function for Spring 2026 Sneaker Offering
summary: SANTA BARBARA, Calif., March 12, 2026--Southern California-based global lifestyle brand UGG® (a division of Deckers Brands [NYSE: DECK] introduces an offering of sneakers that preserves the brand’s iconic heritage while incorporating enhanced utility capabilities. Meet the new Heritage Utility collection. Classic meets modern, rugged yet refined, day to night.
